info.title: Fourthwall APIs
info.description: Service used for management of orders, carts, and payments.

put.description: Sets streaming status to started for specified services
Sets streaming status to ended for specified services

put.summary: Get or create a public token
put.description: Returns an existing public token for the shop, or creates a new one if none exists
Marks digital download as downloaded. If no downloads exist and defaultFileUrl is provided in the request body, creates a download with that URL and marks it as downloaded.

post.description: Create a webhook
Creates a promotion

post.summary: Exchange authorization code or refresh token for access token
post.description: OAuth 2.0 token endpoint. Supports 'authorization_code' grant type for exchanging authorization codes for tokens, and 'refresh_token' grant type for refreshing access tokens.
Creates a new package with specified number of giveaway links

post.summary: Create a fulfillment for an order
post.description: Creates a fulfillment with a shipment tracker for provided order items. When trackers change their state, order.status will change to IN_PRODUCTION, PARTIALLY_IN_PRODUCTION, PARTIALLY_SHIPPED, SHIPPED depending on the shipping tracker info. Order updated webhooks will be triggered.

get.description: Get webhook events with pagination and optional filtering by webhook type
Get a single webhook event by ID
Returns streaming status for all services
Returns the current shop contact info
Lists all tiers for the current shop
Lists all members for the current shop
Returns all packages with giveaway links
Returns all giveaway links for packageId
Returns gift purchase details by id

width.description: The original width of the image in pixels.

height.description: The original height of the image in pixels.

transformedUrl.description: Transformed URL with applied image processing (e.g., resizing, optimization)

creatorDeclaredCost.description: Product cost as declared by the creator. Null if not set.

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.SetRegionsR.description: Request to set regions on a customization

regionIds.description: List of region IDs to activate on the customization

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.SetRegionsR.title: Set Regions Request

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.AvailableRe.description: An available region with selection status

selected.description: Whether this region is currently selected

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.AvailableRe.title: Available Region

availableRegions.description: All available regions with selection status

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.ImagePlacem.description: An image to place on a region

imageUri.description: URI of the image from the media upload flow

offsetX.description: Horizontal offset from center in pixels (positive = right)

offsetY.description: Vertical offset from center in pixels (positive = down)

scale.description: Scale factor (1.0 = fit to region, 2.0 = double size)

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.ImagePlacem.title: Image Placement

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.PlaceImages.description: Request to place images on a customization region

images.description: List of images to place on the region. Empty list clears the region.

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.PlaceImages.title: Place Images Request

offsetX.description: Horizontal offset from center in pixels

offsetY.description: Vertical offset from center in pixels

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.RegionImage.description: Image placements across all regions of a customization

regions.description: All regions with their image placements

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.RegionImage.title: Region Image Placements

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.RegionPlace.description: Image placements for a single region

images.description: Images placed on this region, ordered by layer (first = bottom)

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.RegionPlace.title: Region Placement

com.fourthwall.app.openapi.endpoint.mode.title: Open Api Promotion Membership Subscription Type Applies To
Open Api Promotion Membership Tiers Applies To

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.promotions..title: Promotion Memberships Subscription Type Applies To

client_secret.description: OAuth application client secret (required for confidential clients)

redirect_uri.description: Redirect URI used during authorization (required for authorization_code grant)

code_verifier.description: PKCE code verifier (required for public clients using authorization_code grant)

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.ExternalOrd.title: External Order Item With Id Request

forceCancel.description: If true, bypasses IN_PRODUCTION and ON_HOLD restrictions (cannot bypass PACKAGED or SHIPPED)

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.CancelExter.description: Result of an external order cancellation request

skippedFulfillments.description: Fulfillments that were skipped (could not be cancelled)

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.CancelExter.title: Cancel External Order Response

itemCount.description: Number of items in this fulfillment

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.SkippedFulf.description: Information about a skipped (not cancelled) fulfillment

reason.description: Reason why this fulfillment was skipped

itemCount.description: Number of items in this fulfillment

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.SkippedFulf.title: Skipped Fulfillment Info

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.CreateCusto.description: Request to create a new customization based on a product template

productId.description: Product template ID from the product catalog

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.CreateCusto.title: Create Customization Request

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.Customizati.description: Response containing the created customization details

customizationId.description: Unique customization ID for subsequent operations

designerUrl.description: URL to redirect user to the product designer

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.Customizati.title: Customization

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.SaveMediaIm.description: Request to save an uploaded media image to the customization

uri.description: File URI from the upload link response

sourceDocumentId.description: Source document ID from external design tool

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.SaveMediaIm.title: Save Media Image Request

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.MediaImageV.description: Response containing the saved media image details

id.description: Media image ID

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.MediaImageV.title: Media Image

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.MediaImageL.description: Request to generate a signed upload URL for direct file upload
com.fourthwall.openapi.model.MediaImageL.title: Media Image Link Request

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.MediaImageL.description: Response containing the upload URL for direct file upload

uploadUrl.description: Signed URL for direct upload to GCS

fileUri.description: Final URI to use in save-media-image request

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.MediaImageL.title: Media Image Link

id.description: Event ID

apiVersion.description: API version

updatedAt.description: When the event was last updated

testMode.description: Whether this is a test mode event

id.description: Unique identifier for this kudos contribution

total.description: Total number of product templates matching the query

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.ProductTemp.description: Summary information about a product template
com.fourthwall.openapi.model.ProductTemp.title: Product Template Summary

regionId.description: Region ID used when setting regions on a customization

available.description: Whether this area is available for customization

productionMethod.description: Production method for this area (e.g. DTG, EMBROIDERY, SUBLIMATION)

blueprintSvg.description: Blueprint SVG as an XML string

printAreaPath.description: SVG path 'd' attribute defining the printable area boundary

viewBox.description: SVG viewBox of the print area

sizeVariants.description: Size variants available in this color

status.description: Color variant status (AVAILABLE, DISCONTINUED, OUT_OF_STOCK, PARTIALLY_DISCONTINUED, PARTIALLY_OUT_OF_STOCK)

available.description: Whether the color variant is available for order

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.ProductTemp.description: Product photo with optional design overlay

designOverlay.description: Design overlay URL for this photo

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.ProductTemp.title: Product Template Photo

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.ProductTemp.description: Size variant within a color variant

available.description: Whether this size is available for order

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.ProductTemp.title: Product Template Size Variant

url.description: URL to the size guide page

content.description: Size guide table as HTML or markdown

metadata.description: Custom metadata passed during cart creation. Null for orders without metadata.

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.ExternalOrd.description: Summary of whether an external order can be cancelled

cancellable.description: Whether the order can be cancelled (with or without forceCancel)

notCancellableReason.description: Reason why the order cannot be cancelled, if applicable

fulfillments.description: List of fulfillments with their cancellation status

cancellableItemCount.description: Number of items in cancellable fulfillments

notCancellableItemCount.description: Number of items in non-cancellable fulfillments

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.ExternalOrd.title: External Order Cancellation Summary

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.Fulfillment.description: Cancellation status for a single fulfillment

cancellable.description: Whether this fulfillment can be cancelled without forceCancel

cancellableWithForce.description: Whether this fulfillment can be cancelled with forceCancel=true

notCancellableReason.description: Reason why this fulfillment cannot be cancelled

itemCount.description: Number of items in this fulfillment

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.Fulfillment.title: Fulfillment Cancellation Info

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.NotCancella.description: Reason why an order cannot be cancelled

message.example: All fulfillments are in production. Use forceCancel=true to cancel.

com.fourthwall.openapi.model.NotCancella.title: Not Cancellable Reason
